backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profiles, ban/warn/moderator sets, friend requests, community post moderation, approval workflows, and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement that only the user 'TailsTheBeast124' can pass the AuthGate, mapping it to the relevant frontend files and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Scrambly app, setting the page title, favicon, and mounting point for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes wrapped in AuthGate and Layout, and provides QueryClient and ThemeProvider context.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied UI shown to authenticated users who are not 'TailsTheBeast124', with an explanation and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/AccountLockedMes: Full-screen message shown when a user's account is locked due to repeated violations, with a logout button prompting them to create a new account.
UI toggle component for enabling or disabling the ad blocker feature, using the useAdBlocker hook and displaying the current status.
frontend/src/components/AgeVerificationM: Modal form that collects a user's name and birth year, calls the age verification mutation, and displays access-denied or error states based on the result.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps the app with Internet Identity authentication, handling login/logout, remember-me persistence, onboarding flow, account lock, usage timer expiry, and username-based access restriction.
frontend/src/components/CameraCaptureSte: Onboarding step that activates the user's camera, captures a photo for liveness verification, immediately discards it without storing or uploading, then signals completion.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Renders a threaded community feed with post cards supporting inline image display, editing, deletion, and nested reply composition with image attachments.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostFor: Form for creating new community posts with optional image attachment, client-side banned-keyword filtering, and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCallBut: Pulsing SOS button that shows a confirmation dialog before initiating a tel:911 call via window.location.
frontend/src/components/ExternalSearchBu: Renders 'Search Google' and 'Search DuckDuckGo' buttons for a given query, playing a Dr. Robotnik laugh sound and opening the respective search URL in a new tab when clicked.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Displays a single friend's avatar and display name by fetching their profile via the actor, showing a skeleton loader while loading.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Renders an incoming friend request with the requester's profile info and accept/decline buttons, calling the respond mutation and showing toast notifications on result.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: A slide-up panel (mobile) or modal (desktop) that lists the user's friends and pending friend requests, with a 1000-friend limit warning and scroll area.
frontend/src/components/KidModeWrapper.t: A wrapper component that determines if a user is in 'kid mode' (age ≤ 12) based on their profile and conditionally renders children, kid-only content, or nothing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout providing a sticky header with logo and navigation links, a bottom mobile nav bar, admin-only link, and a sign-out flow with a confirmation dialog for 'Remember Me' users.
frontend/src/components/ModeratorWelcome: Displays a dismissible welcome banner for moderators at the top of the page, persisting dismissal state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingFlow.t: A two-step onboarding flow (camera capture then age/username form) that verifies the user's age and registers their profile, handling various error states including reserved usernames and age restrictions.
frontend/src/components/ParentalFaceScan: A modal that walks parents through a camera-based face scan for verification, capturing and immediately discarding the photo before calling onComplete; falls back to PIN entry if camera is unsupported.
frontend/src/components/PINEntryModal.ts: A modal dialog for parental PIN verification that supports both entering an existing PIN (defaulting to '1234' stored in localStorage) and setting a new PIN with confirmation.
A full-screen overlay displayed when a user is banned from searching, showing ban details, an optional appeal button, and a logout option based on ban type (anime or porn).
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input form with a clear button and submit handler that calls onSearch with the trimmed query value.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Renders a responsive grid of Sonic knowledge or YouTube channel search results with type-specific icons and colors, plus loading skeletons and empty-state messaging.
frontend/src/components/SearchWarningNot: A dismissible warning banner that displays the user's current search warning count, remaining warnings before a ban, and a critical alert when the next violation will trigger a ban.
frontend/src/components/UsageTimerLockou: A full-screen lockout screen shown when a child's daily screen time limit is reached, informing them of the parental control and providing a logout button.
frontend/src/data/knucklesContent.ts: Defines an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects covering Knuckles-related characters, matchups, and lore entries such as his rivalries, clan history, and super form.
frontend/src/data/knucklesVideos.ts: Exports a list of VideoEntry objects representing YouTube videos about Knuckles, including battles, story recaps, and lore, with kid-safety flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicAbilities.ts: Defines a single SonicKnowledgeEntry for Amy's Piko Piko Hammer ability and exports alias keywords for matching hammer/strength-related queries.
frontend/src/data/sonicBoomVideos.ts: Exports a large list of VideoEntry objects for Sonic Boom episodes across multiple seasons, each with a placeholder YouTube ID and kid-friendly flag.
frontend/src/data/sonicCharacters.ts: Exports an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects describing major Sonic franchise characters including Sonic, Shadow, Tails, Amy, Rouge, Eggman, and others.
frontend/src/data/sonicExeVsMetalSonicVi: Exports a list of VideoEntry objects for YouTube videos comparing Sonic.EXE and Metal Sonic, including fan animations, death battles, and rap battles.
frontend/src/data/sonicItems.ts: Exports two SonicKnowledgeEntry objects describing key Sonic franchise items: the Chaos Emeralds and Sonic's iconic Chili Dog.
frontend/src/data/sonicLore.ts: Defines a SonicLoreEntry interface and exports a detailed array of lore entries covering major Sonic game storylines from 1991 through Sonic Adventure, including key characters and notable events.
frontend/src/data/sonicPrimeVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports an array of 24 Sonic Prime episode entries (3 seasons, 8 episodes each) with placeholder YouTube IDs.
frontend/src/data/sonicSaysVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports 15 kid-friendly 'Sonic Says' educational video entries with placeholder YouTube IDs.
frontend/src/data/sonicVsMetalSonicVideo: Exports an array of 7 'Sonic vs Metal Sonic' video entries with real-looking YouTube IDs, reusing the VideoEntry type from speedrunVideos.
frontend/src/data/speedrunVideos.ts: Defines the VideoEntry interface, exports 17 Sonic speedrun video entries across four game categories, and exports a typed SPEEDRUN_CATEGORIES constant.
frontend/src/data/youtubeChannels.ts: Defines a YouTubeChannelEntry interface and exports a single YouTube channel entry for 'Teardropbfb' with its URL and aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdBlocker.ts: Custom hook that manages an ad-blocker toggle state persisted to localStorage, defaulting to enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, age verification, posts, replies, and admin/moderation operations using the useActor hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useRobotnikLaugh.ts: A React hook that synthesizes a Dr. Robotnik-style villain laugh using the Web Audio API with sawtooth oscillators and sub-oscillators, returning a `playLaugh` callback that requires no external audio assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchModerator.ts: A React hook that moderates search queries by detecting inappropriate terms, issuing warnings stored in localStorage, banning users after 5 violations, and granting a one-time appeal; admin user 'TailsTheBeast124' bypasses bans and gets replacement results.
frontend/src/hooks/useUsageTimer.ts: A React hook that counts down a user's remaining usage time (sourced from their profile) in one-second intervals and exposes the remaining time, an expiry flag, and a time formatter.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Fredoka One and Nunito fonts, configures Tailwind with a Sonic-themed OKLCH color palette (CSS custom properties for light and dark modes), and defines reusable component classes like sonic-card, sonic-btn-primary, and speed-lines.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query, Internet Identity, and the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: An admin-only page that provides tabbed UI for banning, warning, unbanning, and promoting users by Principal ID, and lists all registered users, using backend mutation hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AgeMatcher.tsx: A page that displays the current user's profile and searches for other users born in the same year to facilitate age-matched friend discovery, with the feature gated behind an admin check and marked as coming soon for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/AppealPage.tsx: A page that allows banned users to submit a one-time ban appeal with text between 20–500 characters, restricted to a specific allowed origin. Handles states for already-used appeals, no active ban, submission confirmation, and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/BlockBlastGame.tsx: A canvas-based Tetris-style block dropping game with 8x10 grid, colored pieces, line clearing, score tracking, and high score persistence via localStorage. Supports keyboard controls and renders using the HTML5 Canvas API.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: A community forum page that displays posts with role badges, images, edit/delete actions, and nested reply sections fetched from the backend. Supports authenticated interactions via Internet Identity and read-only mode for banned users.
frontend/src/pages/FriendsModePage.tsx: A page for requesting and managing access to a Friends Mode feature, requiring birthdate submission for approval and allowing users to set a display name. Shows pending/approved/denied status, friend count, and opens a friends chat panel.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: A games hub page listing two available mini-games (Block Blast and Sonic Runner) as cards with thumbnails, descriptions, and play links. Also includes a button to open an external games site and a coming-soon modal placeholder.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the Scrambly Sonic fan hub that greets the logged-in user by name and displays navigation cards linking to Search, Videos, Games, Community, and Friends sections.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: A card-flipping memory match mini-game using Sonic-themed emoji symbols, tracking moves and elapsed time with a win state and restart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationDashboard.t: Admin-only moderation dashboard that allows issuing warnings to users, reviewing friends-mode requests, and marking community ideas as reviewed, with access gated by an admin check.
frontend/src/pages/ParentalDashboard.tsx: Parental controls dashboard protected by a face-scan modal and a PIN entry step, allowing parents to configure usage time limits, content restrictions, and change their PIN, with settings persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/RingCollectorGame.tsx: A canvas-based arcade game where the player moves left/right to collect falling rings while avoiding obstacles, tracking score and a localStorage-persisted high score.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: A search page for Sonic-themed content that queries both local data (characters, items, abilities, videos) and a backend API, with parental controls including time limits, warning notices, and a ban screen for inappropriate queries.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: A settings page allowing users to update their profile, set/verify a password, submit feature ideas, apply for moderator status, and delete their account, with kid-mode detection based on birth year.
frontend/src/pages/SonicDodgeGame.tsx: A canvas-based dodge game where the player moves a Sonic character to avoid homing obstacles that spawn from all sides, with increasing speed over time and a local high score tracker.
frontend/src/pages/SonicJumpGame.tsx: A canvas-based platformer game where the player jumps between scrolling platforms using keyboard input, with score tracking and a local high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicRunnerGame.tsx: A canvas-based endless runner game featuring a Sonic-inspired character that jumps over obstacles and collects rings, with increasing speed, score/ring tracking, and a local high score.
frontend/src/pages/SonicTriviaGame.tsx: A 22-question Sonic the Hedgehog trivia game component with multiple-choice answers, score tracking, and a results screen with restart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SpinDashChallengeGame: A timing-based mini-game where players hold a button to charge a meter and release it within a randomized target zone across 8 rounds, with local high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/VideosPage.tsx: A page displaying a filterable grid of Sonic speedrun YouTube videos, organized by game category with kid-mode filtering support.
frontend/src/pages/WhackAChaoGame.tsx: A 30-second whack-a-mole style game using a 3x3 grid where players click randomly appearing Chao characters to score points, with local high score persistence.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and importing typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for 'Scrambly', recording that only the user 'TailsTheBeast124' is permitted to log in and access the admin panel, with no current known issues or new feature requests.
